content:
# Transaction Sharing Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want to share my transactions with other users, so that I can collaboratively manage my finances.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Share a Single Transaction
- **Given** I am logged into the app and have selected a transaction to share
- **When** I enter the recipient's username or email and confirm the sharing action
- **Then** The system notifies the recipient of the shared transaction
- **And** The recipient can view the shared transaction

### AC2: Share Multiple Transactions
- **Given** I am logged into the app and have selected multiple transactions to share
- **When** I enter the recipient's username or email and confirm the sharing action
- **Then** The system notifies the recipient of the shared transactions
- **And** The recipient can view all the shared transactions

### AC3: Access Control for Shared Transactions
- **Given** I have shared a transaction with another user
- **When** The recipient attempts to view the shared transaction
- **Then** The system checks the recipient's access level and grants access if authorized
- **And** The recipient can only view the shared transaction if they have the required access level

### AC4: Error Handling for Invalid Recipient
- **Given** I attempt to share a transaction with an invalid recipient
- **When** The system checks the recipient's username or email
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating the recipient is invalid
- **And** The sharing action is not completed

### AC5: Multi-Account Sharing
- **Given** I have multiple accounts and want to share them with different permissions
- **When** I select the accounts to share and set the permissions for each
- **Then** The system shares the accounts with the specified permissions
- **And** The recipient can view the shared accounts according to the permissions

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Personal Finance App Specification](https://example.com/spec)

---

# Access Control Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want to control access to my shared transactions, so that I can manage who can view my financial information.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Set Access Level for Shared Transactions
- **Given** I have shared a transaction with another user
- **When** I set the access level for the recipient
- **Then** The system updates the access level for the shared transaction
- **And** The recipient's access to the shared transaction is restricted according to the set access level

### AC2: View Shared Transactions with Valid Access Level
- **Given** I have been granted access to a shared transaction
- **When** I attempt to view the shared transaction
- **Then** The system checks my access level and grants access if authorized
- **And** I can view the shared transaction

### AC3: View Shared Transactions with Invalid Access Level
- **Given** I have not been granted access to a shared transaction
- **When** I attempt to view the shared transaction
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating I do not have the required access level
- **And** I cannot view the shared transaction

### AC4: Update Access Level for Shared Transactions
- **Given** I have previously set an access level for a shared transaction
- **When** I update the access level for the recipient
- **Then** The system updates the access level for the shared transaction
- **And** The recipient's access to the shared transaction is restricted according to the updated access level

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Personal Finance App Specification](https://example.com/spec)

---

# Multi-Account Sharing Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want to share multiple accounts with different permissions, so that I can manage my finances collaboratively with others.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Share Multiple Accounts with Different Permissions
- **Given** I have multiple accounts and want to share them with different permissions
- **When** I select the accounts to share and set the permissions for each
- **Then** The system shares the accounts with the specified permissions
- **And** The recipient can view the shared accounts according to the permissions

### AC2: View Shared Accounts with Valid Permissions
- **Given** I have been granted access to a shared account
- **When** I attempt to view the shared account
- **Then** The system checks my permissions and grants access if authorized
- **And** I can view the shared account

### AC3: View Shared Accounts with Invalid Permissions
- **Given** I have not been granted access to a shared account
- **When** I attempt to view the shared account
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating I do not have the required permissions
- **And** I cannot view the shared account

### AC4: Update Permissions for Shared Accounts
- **Given** I have previously set permissions for a shared account
- **When** I update the permissions for the recipient
- **Then** The system updates the permissions for the shared account
- **And** The recipient's access to the shared account is restricted according to the updated permissions

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Personal Finance App Specification](https://example.com/spec)
